ayahs.arabic: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالذَّارِيَاتِ ذَرْوًا
ayahs.translation: By the [winds] scattering [dust], dispersing [it]

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَالْحَامِلَاتِ وِقْرًا
ayahs.translation: And the [clouds] carrying a load [of water]

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَالْجَارِيَاتِ يُسْرًا
ayahs.translation: And the ships sailing with ease

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَالْمُقَسِّمَاتِ أَمْرًا
ayahs.translation: And the [angels] apportioning [each] matter,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is true.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَإِنَّ الدِّينَ لَوَاقِعٌ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالسَّمَاءِ ذَاتِ الْحُبُكِ
ayahs.translation: By the heaven containing pathways,[1535]

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِي قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, you are in differing speech.[1536]

ayahs.arabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
ayahs.translation: Deluded away from it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is he who is deluded.

ayahs.arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قُتِلَ الْخَرَّاصُونَ
ayahs.translation: Destroyed are the misinformers[1537]

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.

ayahs.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَسْأَلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ الدِّينِ
ayahs.translation: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense?"

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى النَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
ayahs.translation: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire

ayahs.arabic: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: ذُوقُوا فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَٰذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allatheekuntum bihi tastaAAjiloon
ayahs.translation: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,

ayahs.arabic: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: آخِذِينَ مَا آتَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Akhitheena ma atahumrabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineen
ayahs.translation: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.

ayahs.arabic: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: كَانُوا قَلِيلًا مِّنَ اللَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: They used to sleep but little of the night,[1538]

ayahs.arabic: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَبِالْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,

ayahs.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي أَمْوَالِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّائِلِ وَالْمَحْرُومِ
ayahs.translation: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي الْأَرْضِ آيَاتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]

ayahs.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي السَّمَاءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.translation: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَا أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawarabbi assama-i wal-ardiinnahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoon
ayahs.translation: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham?[1539] -

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا سَلَامًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَامٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloosalaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroon
ayahs.translation: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace; [you are] a people unknown."

ayahs.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰ أَهْلِهِ فَجَاءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَقَرَّبَهُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَامٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo latakhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleem
ayahs.translation: And he felt from them apprehension.[1540] They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَقْبَلَتِ امْرَأَتُهُ فِي صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkatwajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeem
ayahs.translation: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman!"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالُوا كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo kathaliki qalarabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleem
ayahs.translation: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."

ayahs.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالُوا إِنَّا أُرْسِلْنَا إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals[1541]

ayahs.arabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.translation: To send down upon them stones of clay,

ayahs.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.translation: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: So We brought out whoever was in them [i.e., the cities] of the believers.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama wajadna feehaghayra baytin mina almuslimeen
ayahs.translation: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.[1542]

ayahs.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَا آيَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Watarakna feeha ayatanlillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba al-aleem
ayahs.translation: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي مُوسَىٰ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَاهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee moosa ith arsanahuila firAAawna bisultanin mubeen
ayahs.translation: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.[1543]

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِ وَقَالَ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.translation: But he turned away with his supporters and said, "A magician or a madman."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَخَذْنَاهُ وَجُنُودَهُ فَنَبَذْنَاهُمْ فِي الْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahufanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleem
ayahs.translation: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ الرِّيحَ الْعَقِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee AAadin ith arsalnaAAalayhimu arreeha alAAaqeem
ayahs.translation: And in ʿAad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.[1544]

ayahs.arabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَالرَّمِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tatharu min shay-in atatAAalayhi illa jaAAalat-hu karrameem
ayahs.translation: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahumtamattaAAoo hatta heen
ayahs.translation: And in Thamūd, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."

ayahs.arabic: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَعَتَوْا عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّاعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathat-humuassaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroon
ayahs.translation: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا مُنتَصِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama istataAAoo min qiyaminwama kanoo muntasireen
ayahs.translation: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَوْمًا فَاسِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanooqawman fasiqeen
ayahs.translation: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالسَّمَاءَ بَنَيْنَاهَا بِأَيْدٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ayahs.translation: And the heaven We constructed with strength,[1545] and indeed, We are [its] expander.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَاهَا فَنِعْمَ الْمَاهِدُونَ
ayahs.translation: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.

ayahs.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wamin kulli shay-in khalaqna zawjaynilaAAallakum tathakkaroon
ayahs.translation: And of all things We created two mates [i.e., counterparts]; perhaps you will remember.

ayahs.arabic: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَفِرُّوا إِلَى اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Fafirroo ila Allahi inneelakum minhu natheerun mubeen
ayahs.translation: So flee to Allāh.[1546] Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahanakhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeen
ayahs.translation: And do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: كَذَٰلِكَ مَا أَتَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika ma ata allatheenamin qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirunaw majnoon
ayahs.translation: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."

ayahs.arabic: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَتَوَاصَوْا بِهِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoon
ayahs.translation: Did they suggest it to them?[1547] Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَا أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
ayahs.translation: So leave them, [O Muḥammad], for you are not to be blamed.

ayahs.arabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَا أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَا أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wamaoreedu an yutAAimoon
ayahs.translation: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ ذُو الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna Allaha huwa arrazzaquthoo alquwwati almateen
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is Allāh who is the [continual] Provider,[1548] the firm possessor of strength.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَابِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-inna lillatheena thalamoothanooban mithla thanoobi as-habihimfala yastaAAjiloon
ayahs.translation: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their companions [i.e., predecessors], so let them not impatiently urge Me.

ayahs.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِن يَوْمِهِمُ الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo minyawmihimu allathee yooAAadoon
ayahs.translation: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
